about_description: bitcoin.rocks is a free, open-source Bitcoin education website founded in 2022. Our mission is to accelerate Bitcoin adoption through education.
about_mission_1: bitcoin.rocks was founded in 2022 with a simple mission: accelerate Bitcoin adoption through education.
about_mission_2: We exist to be the first link you share with someone who is curious about Bitcoin. A friendly, accessible starting point that explains how Bitcoin is building a better world.
about_mission_3: Too many people misunderstand Bitcoin or have never been properly introduced to it. We want to change that by providing free, high-quality educational content that anyone can understand.
about_what_we_do_1: We create free educational content for Bitcoin newcomers. Our website covers topics like inflation, self-custody, wallets, the Lightning Network, and how Bitcoin compares to other assets and payment systems.
about_what_we_do_2c: to your door so you can help spread Bitcoin awareness in your community. Hundreds of people scan the QR codes on these stickers each month to learn about Bitcoin.
about_what_we_do_3e: for anyone who wants to help onboard local businesses to accept Bitcoin payments.
about_what_we_do_4: All of our content assumes zero prior Bitcoin knowledge. Whether you are brand new to Bitcoin or a seasoned Bitcoiner looking for resources to share, bitcoin.rocks is for you.
about_editorial_1: Every piece of content on bitcoin.rocks is curated and fact-checked. When we reference data or statistics, we cite our sources so you can verify the information yourself.
about_editorial_2: We link to trusted sources like TIME Magazine, Forbes, MIT Technology Review, Lyn Alden, and many others. We believe that Bitcoin speaks for itself when the facts are presented clearly.
about_editorial_3: Our content is regularly reviewed and updated to ensure accuracy and freshness. All content is focused exclusively on Bitcoin education.
about_open_source_1a: bitcoin.rocks is a free, open-source project licensed under the MIT License. Our entire codebase is publicly available
about_open_source_2: Anyone can contribute to bitcoin.rocks. We especially welcome translators who help make our content accessible to people around the world.
about_open_source_3: Thanks to our community of volunteer translators, bitcoin.rocks is currently available in 31 languages and growing.
about_contact_1: We would love to hear from you. Whether you have a question, suggestion, or just want to say hello, reach out anytime.
